form.formComment: Second-up today. Last outing held ground to the line 2nd of 8 at this track Mdn on March 30 over 1200m, slow going 0.6 len behind Olington Lane with 60kg at $3.90. At only start last preparation 4th in a small field at Nowra Mdn-Sw on June 17 over 1200m, on a slow track; 4.5 len behind Insain Jewel carrying 59kg at $1.45. Solid return and shouldn't be a Maiden for long.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. First-up 7th of 11 at Canberra Fedral Mdn on March 8 over 1000m, on a slow track; 4 len behind Travelon Dory carrying 58kg at $7. Last start 8th of 11 at Albury Super Mdn-Sw on March 20 over 1175m, slow going 4.5 len behind Borjnord carrying 58.5kg at $26. Tough to beat from the low draw.

form.formComment: Natalie Jarvis trained three-year-old gelding lining up for first race start. Recent trial winner at Wagga. Goes into the exotics.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. At the latest run got back early 4th of 8 at this track Mdn on March 30 over 1200m, on a slow track; 4 len behind Olington Lane carrying 58.5kg at $4.80. The race before that held ground to the line 2nd of 7 at Goulburn Ctry Mdn on March 10 over 1200m, on a slow track; 0.6 len behind Inna Zou carrying 57.5kg at $3.60. At her top for this and a win looks imminent despite drawing out.

form.formComment: Last start raced on the speed throughout before fading to run last of 7 at Canberra Mdn-Sw on March 25 over 1300m, slow going 14 len behind Uber In with 59kg at $10. Before that 6th of 11 at Kembla Grange Prov Mdn-Sw on March 13 over 1400m, slow going 4.5 len behind Cabbucio with 59kg at $7. Has a host of gear changes from the sticky draw, keep safe.

On debut tenth of 12 at this track Ctry Mdn-Sw May 4 over 1007m, soft track; 6 len behind Giza carrying 59kg at $31. Wait and see how he returns.

Second-up 4th of 11 at Canberra Fedral Mdn on March 8 over 1000m, on a slow track; 3 len behind Travelon Dory with 56kg at $15. Drawn well and is among the chances.

form.formComment: Having third race start. When well in the market at debut, 9th of 11 at Canberra Fedral Mdn on March 8 over 1000m, slow going 8 len behind Travelon Dory with 56.5kg at $5. Second-up 8th of 11 at this track Ctry Mdn-Sw on March 30 over 1000m, on a slow track; 6 len behind Inchyra with 54.5kg at $21. Others read better. Worth thought with the blinkers going on.
